sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented for this boxing game

special_mechanics.name: Ring Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls George Foreman's movement in the boxing ring with limited mobility options

physics_values.movement_constraint: Limited - critics noted 'inability to move in the ring' and 'limited movement from the main character'

special_mechanics.name: Combat Actions
special_mechanics.description: Block opponent punches, evade in two directions, throw variety of punches

special_mechanics.name: Knockdown System
special_mechanics.description: Knockout requires knocking opponent down 4 times in 3-round match; technical knockout on 3 knockdowns in single round

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative. This is a boxing game with no documented jump physics or sub-pixel data. Movement is primarily ring-based combat positioning. Wikipedia source notes 'jerky animation', 'limited movement', and 'little opportunity to dodge' from contemporary reviews. No quantitative physics values documented in available source material.
